title: Simulated contactless payment cards providing multiple temporary profiles and corresponding credentials
abstract: A bridge service is provided to support multi-user simulated contactless cards that in response to receiving a request to provision a secure element with payment card profile information of a user, provisions a token representing the payment card profile, converts the token representing the payment card profile into a format for the payment application; and provides the payment card profile to the payment application, the payment card profile comprising a single use key. The bridge service enables simulated contactless cards to store payment card information for a user on volatile memory instead of the persistent, secure element memory.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A method comprising: receiving a request to provision a secure element with payment card profile information of a user; provisioning a token representing a payment card profile associated with the user; converting the token representing the payment card profile into a format for a payment application; and providing the converted payment card profile to the payment application, the converted payment card profile comprising a single use key. 2. The method of claim 1 , wherein the request to provision the secure element comprises: an identification of the user. 3. The method of claim 2, wherein the identification of the user comprises a biometric of the user. 4. The method of claim 1, wherein receiving the request to provision the secure element with the payment card profile information of the user comprising: receiving a first communication indicating the user; and receiving a second communication indicating a request responding to a notification of an available payment card profile for the user, wherein the single use key is provided in response to the second communication. 5. The method of claim 1, further comprising: authenticating the user before provisioning the token representing the payment card profile of the user. 6. The method of claim l, further comprising: generating the single use key. 7. A computing device comprising: 

 a processor; a storage device; and instructions stored in the storage device that when executed by the processor, direct the computing device to: receive a request to be provisioned for a particular user; communicate a provisioning request for a payment card profile information of the particular user to a bridge service; receive die payment card profile information from the bridge service, the payment card profile information comprising a single use key; and store the payment card profile information in a volatile memory. 8. The computing device of claim 7, wherein the volatile memory is configured for CLEAR_ON_DESELECT. 9. The computing device of claim 7, wherein the payment card profile information further comprises a personal account number. 10. The computing device of claim 7, further comprising instructions that direct the computing device to: in response to receiving the request to be provisioned for the particular user, authenticate the particular user for performing a transaction with the payment card profile information of the particular user. 11. The computing device of claim 10, wherein the instructions to authenticate the particular user direct the computing device to: obtain a biometric of the particular user; and communicate the biometric to the bridge service. 12. The computing device of claim 7, further comprising instructions that direct the computing device to: communicate a transaction message comprising the payment card profile information to a payment network. 13. The computing device of claim 12, further comprising instructions that direct the computing device to: erase the payment card profile information after communicating the transaction message. 14. The computing device of claim 13, further comprising instructions that direct the computing device to: receive a second request to be provisioned for a second user different than the particular user; communicate a second provisioning request for a second payment card profile information of the second user to the bridge service; receive the second payment card profile information from the bridge service, the second payment card profile infonnation comprising a second single use key; store the second payment card profile information in the volatile memory; communicate a second transaction message comprising the second payment card profile information to the payment network; and erase the second payment card profile information after communicating the second transaction message. 15. The computing device of claim 7, further comprising instructions that direct the computing device to: receive a second request to be provisioned for a second user different than the particular user; communicate a second provisioning request for a second payment card profile information of the second user to the bridge service; receive the second payment card profile information from the bridge service, the second payment card profile infonnation comprising a second single use key; and store the second payment card profile information in the volatile memory.
